name: Justice Finance
description_short: Justice Finance is a privately owned personal loan lender in the DFW metroplex offering signature loans up to $1,800 with no collateral required and flexible payment options.
description_long:
Justice Finance is a privately owned financing firm operating across the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area with eighteen physical branch locations. The company specializes in small personal loans designed to be accessible to borrowers who may have difficulty obtaining credit elsewhere, explicitly positioning itself as an alternative to payday lenders and online lending platforms.

The company offers cash loans up to $1,800 with signature-only lending (no security or collateral required), no checking account requirement, and flexible payment options tailored to individual budgets. Applicants can apply online, by phone, or in person at local branches. Justice Finance emphasizes a three-step process: online application or in-person visit, loan validation by their experts, and approval subject to credit requirements. According to customer testimonials, interest rates appear competitive for the small loan segment, with one customer noting paying $100 monthly on a $1,000 loan.

Justice Finance distinguishes itself through personal service and willingness to work with borrowers who have poor credit histories or limited financial documentation. Multiple testimonials highlight staff friendliness, quick processing, and flexibility in working with applicants who had challenges (new employment, bad credit history, limited check stubs). The company emphasizes responsible lending, integrity, and competitive rates as core values.

The primary limitation is geographic restriction to DFW locations only, requiring in-person visits for fund disbursement. Loan amounts are capped at $1,800, which may not serve borrowers needing larger amounts. While the website explicitly states they are not a payday lender, specific APR ranges and detailed loan terms are not disclosed online, requiring applicants to contact the company directly for full pricing information.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No collateral or security required—signature-only loans
No checking account requirement, reducing barriers for underbanked consumers
Eighteen physical locations throughout DFW for convenient access and in-person support
Explicitly not a payday lender, suggesting more sustainable loan structures
Demonstrates willingness to work with poor credit and non-traditional applicants (per testimonials)
Fast approval and funding process with online application option
Staff repeatedly praised for friendliness, professionalism, and going above-and-beyond customer service
cons: Geographic limitation to DFW area only—requires in-person branch visit for fund pickup
Maximum loan amount of $1,800 is relatively low and may not serve larger borrowing needs
Specific APR ranges, repayment terms, and full loan pricing not disclosed on website—requires direct inquiry
All loans subject to credit requirements, meaning approval is not guaranteed despite less stringent criteria
best_for: DFW residents with poor or limited credit history needing small emergency cash loans
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without checking accounts or traditional credit access
Borrowers seeking in-person service and relationship-based lending with flexible terms
New employees or self-employed individuals with non-traditional income documentation
diagnosis: Justice Finance is best for DFW-area residents with poor credit or limited banking access who need small loans ($500–$1,800) and value in-person service and staff flexibility. The main caveat is geographic restriction to Dallas-Fort Worth and the requirement to visit a branch for final approval and fund disbursement, plus lack of transparent APR/term disclosure online.
services: Online loan applications with rapid validation
In-person loan applications at 18 branch locations
Appointment scheduling with local branch staff
Flexible payment plan options tailored to borrower budgets
Loans with no collateral or security required
Personalized loan guidance and application support
Quick approval and funding (same day or next business day based on testimonials)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
